content:
Here's another example code to make things more interesting:

```python
import os
import subprocess

SOURCE = "/production/data"
DEST = "/test/data"

# Sync production data to test data
subprocess.run(["rsync", "-av", "--delete", "--exclude", "*.tmp", SOURCE, DEST])

# Confirm the sync was successful
os.system("diff -r " + DEST + " " + SOURCE)
```

This code will sync the contents of the `/production/data` directory to `/test/data` and also exclude any files with the .tmp extension. Then it will check if the sync was successful by comparing the two directories using the `diff` command.
